args:
set -eu
for candidate in "${CODEX_HOME:-$HOME/.codex}/plugins/cache/gomons-codex-plugins/codanna/local/scripts/launch_codanna.sh" "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/gomons-codex-plugins/codanna/local/scripts/launch_codanna.sh"
do
  if [ -x "$candidate" ]; then
    exec "$candidate" serve --watch
  fi
done

echo "Unable to locate codanna launcher under the Codex plugin cache. Reinstall the plugin and try again." >&2
exit 1
codanna.note: Wraps Codanna's official stdio launch command with a local bootstrap script resolved from the Codex plugin cache. The launcher fails fast with a clear error when the current project does not already have a Codanna index, otherwise it refreshes that index with `codanna index` and then runs `codanna serve --watch`.
